violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Kitchen employees was observed switching between working with raw meats and working with ready-to-eat foods without washing hands and re-gloving.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food items in walk in cooler noted not properly labeled with proper descriptors.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Vent hood above the main cooking equipment noted not clean.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Cardboard being used as shelf liners in the kitchen noted not properly designed.

HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in kitchen and food prep areas noted blocked with cases of soda concentrate in the prep kitchen area and large stock pots in the kitchen area.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in kitchen. Observed cases of avacados being stored directly on the floor near the cookline in the kitchen.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of chopped vegetables sauces meats etc. was noted not being properly dated for disposition in the burrito express area 2 door upright and in the main walk in cooler.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen and in food prep areas.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Shelves being lined through out the kitchen and prep areas with cardboard which is an absorbent material.
